title: carex boliviensis subsp. boliviensis
intro: Carex boliviensis subsp. boliviensis, also known as Bolivian sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in the Andean region of South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health issues. The health benefits of Carex boliviensis subsp. boliviensis include its potential to reduce fever, soothe digestive problems, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are often dried and made into teas or infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments.
